message:
refactor: cross-cutting modernization of syntax patterns, error handling, and API consistency

Comprehensive refinement pass across all franken_node subsystems (~116 files),
applying consistent code quality improvements without changing behavior:

Guard pattern modernization:
- Convert nested if-let patterns to Rust 1.80+ && guard chains across
  control_plane, connector, security, and runtime modules for reduced
  indentation and improved readability

CRDT Default trait implementation:
- Add explicit Default trait implementations for LwwMap, OrSet, GCounter,
  PnCounter and delegate new() constructors to Default::default() for
  Rust convention compliance

Method renaming (incident_bundle_retention):
- Rename from_str() to parse() on Severity, RetentionTier, ExportFormat
  to avoid confusion with FromStr trait convention

Error handling improvements:
- Replace unchecked unwrap() with expect() including context messages
  explaining why values are guaranteed present

Return expression simplification:
- Remove intermediate variable assignments in closure_proof() methods,
  directly returning call results

Feature addition (partner_lighthouse_programs):
- Add duplicate deployment and outcome detection with error codes
  PLP-ERR-003 and PLP-ERR-004, including validation tests preventing
  count drift

Miscellaneous:
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] attributes where needed (config.rs)
- Minor single-line consistency improvements across 20+ modules in
  connector, control_plane, security, observability, storage,
  supply_chain, and VEF subsystems

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

             ProfileError::MissingResult("x".into()),
             ProfileError::CapabilityFailed("x".into()),

     target_epoch: u64,
